data.title: GH Research Showcases Promising Depression Treatment at ECNP 2025
data.description:
GH Research ( (GHRS) ) has issued an update.

GH Research PLC announced its participation in the 38th European College of Neuropsychopharmacology Congress held from October 11-14, 2025, in Amsterdam. The company presented long-term clinical data on its lead product candidate, GH001, which demonstrated safety and efficacy in treating treatment-resistant depression. The data, shared through a symposium presentation and two posters, highlighted GH001’s potential as a rapid-acting antidepressant with a favorable safety profile, reinforcing its promise in addressing the unmet medical need for TRD.

The most recent analyst rating on (GHRS) stock is a Buy with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GH Research stock, see the GHRS Stock Forecast page.

data.description:

On October 6, 2025, Leap Therapeutics entered into a Securities Purchase Agreement for a private placement, closing on October 8, 2025, raising approximately $58.88 million. The funds will support Leap’s new digital asset treasury strategy and ongoing therapeutic programs, including FL-501 and sirexatamab. The private placement was conducted under Nasdaq rules, and Parcrest acted as the placement agent.

data.title: Neurogene Completes FDA Talks for Rett Syndrome Trial
data.description:
An announcement from Neurogene ( (NGNE) ) is now available.

On October 9, 2025, Neurogene Inc. announced the completion of discussions with the FDA regarding the protocol for its Embolden™ registrational trial for NGN-401 gene therapy in Rett syndrome, with plans to begin dosing in the fourth quarter of 2025. The company presented new preclinical data at the ESGCT Congress, demonstrating that intracerebroventricular (ICV) administration of NGN-401 is superior to intrathecal lumbar (IT-L) in reaching key brain regions, reinforcing the potential efficacy of this delivery method. The trial will enroll participants across 13 sites, reflecting strong interest from the Rett syndrome community, and aims to expedite the submission of a BLA application for NGN-401.

The most recent analyst rating on (NGNE) stock is a Buy with a $45.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Neurogene stock, see the NGNE Stock Forecast page.

data.description:

data.title: Aardvark Therapeutics Aligns with FDA on Trial Amendment
data.description:
Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. ( (AARD) ) has shared an announcement.

On October 8, 2025, Aardvark Therapeutics announced an alignment with the U.S. FDA on a protocol amendment for its Phase 3 HERO trial of ARD-101, aimed at treating hyperphagia associated with Prader-Willi Syndrome. The amendment lowers the minimum age of trial participants from 13 to 10 years, potentially expanding the patient population and addressing the needs of younger patients who may benefit from early intervention. This strategic move, supported by the PWS community, is expected to enhance the company’s positioning in the biopharmaceutical industry, with topline data anticipated in the third quarter of 2026.

Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel, small-molecule therapeutics to activate innate homeostatic pathways for the treatment of metabolic diseases.
